sections.sectionTitle: David in Israel leh Judah Mi Phazah Sim

verses.text: Satan in Israel mite gimsak nuam ahih manin Israel mi phazah a sim dingin David hanthawn hi

Tua ahih ciangin David in Joab leh galkap a ukte kiangah, “Pai un; Beersheba panin Dan ciangdong Israel mi phazah va sim un la, amaute a phazah ka theihna dingin kei kiangah thu hong zasak un,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Joab in, “ Topa in a mite a zah za khatin behlap ta hen! Ka to kumpipa aw, amaute khempeuh ka topa' nasemte hilo ahi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin ka topa in hih kisam sa na hi hiam? Bang hangin Israel tungah mawhna tun' ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Ahih hangin kumpipa in Joab thuzawh hi. Tua ciangin Joab kihemkhia-in Israel sung khempeuhah pai a, tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah hong ciahkik hi

Tua ciangin Joab in David kiangah mite a kigawm khit ciangin a phazah a pia hi. Israel khempeuh sungah gal kap thei ding mihing awn khat leh sang khat om a, Judah sungah gal kap thei ding mi tul za leh tul sawmsagih om hi
Ahih hangin Joab in kumpipa' thupiakna hoihsa hetlo ahih manin a mi simna-ah Levi minam leh Benjamin minamte hello hi
Ahih hangin hih thu-ah Pasian lungkimlo a, amah in Israel-te vatgawp hi

Tua ciangin David in Pasian kiangah, “Hih ka nasepna-ah nakpi takin ka khial hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tungah kong thum hi; na nasempa' mawhna hong maisak in; bang hang hiam cih leh a haihuai mahmahin ka gamta kha khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in David' thumupa Gad tungah thu gen a
“Pai in la David kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangma tungah thu thum kong pia hi. Nang tungah kong hih theihna dingin tuate khat teel in, ci hi,’ ci-in gen in” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David kiangah Gad hong pai-in ama tungah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi, ‘Na lak ding khat teel in

Kialpi kum thum sung, ahih kei leh na galte in nang hong simgawp laitakin na galte mai-ah kha thum sung galtaina, ahih kei leh gamsungah pulnatna leh Topa' vantung mi in Israel sung khempeuhah suksiatna ni thum sung a piangsak Topa' namsau,’ ci hi. Tu-in kei hong sawlpa kiangah ka ciahpih ding dawn'na ding khentel in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in Gad kiangah, “Keimah in lungkhamna lianpi khat ka tuak hi. Ama hehpihna lian mahmah ahih manin Topa' khutsungah hong puksak in la, mihing' khutsungah hong puksak kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel tungah pulnatna khat tungsak a, Israel mi tul sawmsagih puk hi

Tua ciangin Pasian in a susia dingin Jerusalem-ah vantung mi sawl hi. Ahih hangin amah in a suksiat ding laitakin Topa in mu a, tua thusia-ah amah kisik hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a susia vantung mi kiangah, “Phazo hi; tu-in khawl ta in,” a ci hi. Jebus mi Ornan' ancilna gei-ah Topa' vantung mi a din' laitak ahi hi

Tua ciangin David khuadak to a, leitung leh vantung kikalah Topa' vantung mi dingin, a khutsungah a kidoksa namsau khat omin Jerusalem tungah a zan mu hi. Tua ciangin David leh a upate puanhampi silhin maipuk uh hi

Tua ciangin David in Pasian kiangah, “Mi phazah a sim dingin thu a piapa keimah hilo ka hi hiam? Khialin a gitloh gamtat mahmahpa keimah ka hi hi. Ahih hangin hih mite in bang gamtat khialhna nei ahi uh hiam? Topa ka Pasian aw, kong thum hi, keimah leh ka innkuan gim hong pia in. Ahih hangin na mite tungah gimna tungsak kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David paito-in Jebus mi Ornan' ancilna phualah Topa-a' ding biakna tau khat a lamna ding a gen dingin Topa' vantung mi in Gad sawl hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' min tawh a gen Gad' kammal bangin David paito hi
Ornan leh a tapa lite in mangbuh a cilcil laitakin a khuadak uh leh Topa' vantung mi mu uh a, a tapa lite lau-in a bu uh hi
Ornan kiangah David hong tun' ciangin, Ornan khuadak a, David mu-in ancilna panin hong paikhia a, a mai leilam ngatin David tungah zahtakna a bawl hi

Tua ciangin David in Ornan kiangah, “Mite kiang panin gimna a ven' theihna dingin Topa-a' ding biakna tau khat ka lam theihna dingin na ancilna mun hong pia in. A man a cingin piak dingin hong pia in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Ornan in David kiangah, “La in; ko to kumpipa in hoih na sak bangin hih in. Meihal biaknate-a zat dingin bawngtalte, a sing dingin ancilna singte, leh an tawh biakna dingin a mangbuhte kong pia hi. A vekpi-in kong pia hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Kumpi David in Ornan kiangah, “Hilo hi, a man a cing tawh kong lei ding hi. Topa-a' dingin nangma-a' ka la kei ding a, keima sum beiloin meihal biaknate zong ka pia kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David in Ornan' tungah a mun leina dingin kham shekel zaguk a gik a pia hi

Tua ciangin David in tua lai-ah Topa-a' dingin biakna tau khat lamin meihal biaknate leh thunuama biaknate bawlin Topa' tungah thu ngen a, tua ciangin amah in a thungetna a piakna-in a meihal biakna a hal dingin vantung panin meikuang a piasuk hi
Tua ciangin Topa' thupiakna tawh vantung mi in a namsau a pai sungah a siatkik hi.
Tua hunin, Jebus mi Ornan' ancilna phualah ama nget thu Topa in a piakna David in a muh ciangin amah in tua lai-ah a biakpiaknate a bawl hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in gamlakah a bawl Topa' biakbuk leh meihal biakna tau pen tua hunin Gibeon mual dawnah omlai hi
Ahih hangin amah in Topa' vantung mi' namsau kihta ahih manin Pasian tungah thu a dong dingin tua lai-ah David pai ngamlo hi.
